title: NFS-Data-Documentation-Procedure
author: Scotti, Roberto
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Procedure facilitating the documentation and FAIR data sharing of a consolidated data set. Using a simple spreadsheet template, the program produces an SQLite database, with verified relations and an accompanying 'pdf' documentation, including the ER diagram
steps_raw: Procedure facilitating the documentation and FAIR data sharing of a consolidated data set. Using a simple spreadsheet template, the program produces an SQLite database, with verified relations and an accompanying 'pdf' documentation, including the ER diagram
